## PluginExternalValue.url property

> Warning: This API is now obsolete.
> 
> Prefer `bundlePath`<!-- -->, which resolves through the runtime public path and lets higher-level tooling manage asset emission.
> 

Bundle URL.

Use this only when the external bundle lives outside the current build output and should not be emitted or served by `pluginExternalBundle`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
url?: string;
```
